text:
いつもいつも苦しい課題ばっかり
課していたら疲れちゃうもんね。
何事も飴と鞭よ。アメとムチ。

だからといって手を抜いたら
アンタ即刻へっぽこぴーへ逆戻り。

楽だと思うときほど慎重に。
これは万事の鉄則よ。

ほら、そのことしっかり胸に
刻み込んで、やって

You'd get worn out if I gave you nothing but
painful assignments. You've gotta get the stick
AND the carrot, not just one or the other.

But if you use that as an excuse to slack off,
I'm booking you a one-way ticket back to
clown town.

The easiest jobs are the easiest to screw up.
You've always gotta stay on your toes.

Carve that lesson into your heart and
get to work!
